source: XE.com mid-market rates 13:45 UTC, cross-referenced with ExchangeRate-API
baseNote: Rates show ZMW per 1 unit of foreign currency. ↑ ZMW = Kwacha weakening (depreciating).
mpRateNote: Monetary Policy Rate held at 13.50% — reduced 75bps from 14.25% on Feb 11, 2026. BOZ held rate at May 2026 review. Next review: August 2026.

USD.note: XE Jul 2: 1 USD = 18.298 ZMW (1 ZMW = 0.0547 USD). Kwacha weakened further vs USD from 18.040 (Jun 25) — 1.4% depreciation as USD strengthened globally.

GBP.note: 1 GBP = 24.465 ZMW (XE Jul 2). Sterling firmer vs kwacha from 23.765 — 2.9% weekly depreciation.

EUR.note: 1 EUR = 20.943 ZMW (XE Jul 2). Euro up 2.2% vs kwacha from 20.495.

ZAR.note: 1 ZAR = 1.127 ZMW (XE Jul 2). Rand firmed 3.6% vs kwacha from 1.088. 1 ZMW = 0.888 ZAR.

BWP.note: Botswana pula. ExchangeRate-API cross: 1 ZMW = 0.779 BWP → 1 BWP = 1.283 ZMW. Stable.

CNY.note: Chinese yuan. ExchangeRate-API: 1 ZMW = 0.374 CNY → 1 CNY = 2.675 ZMW. Kwacha weakening slightly against yuan.

trendAnalysis.direction: Kwacha weakened across the board this week — USD/ZMW broke above 18.29, the highest since mid-June. Global USD strength and EM currency pressure pushing kwacha 1.4% softer since Jun 25.
drivers: Record copper output 890K tonnes (2025) — strong export earnings
Record maize harvest >4M tonnes — reduced food import needs
Debt restructuring 94% complete — sovereign risk premium collapsing
IMF successor programme talks scheduled July 2026 — staff visit confirmed
MPR at 13.5% — high real yields attracting carry trade inflows
Yuan mining tax corridor reducing USD demand
Gross international reserves at historic high of US$6.5 billion
ERB cut fuel prices for July — lower import bill supporting kwacha
trendAnalysis.outlook: Kwacha tested 18.30 resistance as USD strengthened broadly. Market watching BOZ for intervention signals. Range shifting to 18.00–18.50. ERB fuel price cut for July provides partial offset to import costs.
trendAnalysis.projection3m: USD/ZMW 16.50–18.50 range. Elections expected to drive volatility.
trendAnalysis.projection6m: USD/ZMW 16.00–19.00 range. Post-election clarity determines direction.
